metadata.description: Brain-inspired tiered memory compression that extends AI context windows 3-4x with optional post-quantum encryption. Automatic hot/warm/cold/frozen storage tiers, semantic indexing for instant search, progressive recall, and per-artifact envelope encryption using ML-KEM-768 (NIST FIPS 203).

plugins.name: engram
plugins.description: Tiered memory compression with context enhancement and PQ encryption
